name: manage_targeting
description: Set targeting criteria on a line item to control who sees your ads. Target by location, gender, age range, language, interests, keywords, device, OS, follower look-alikes, and custom audiences. Multiple targeting criteria can be combined.

parameters.name: line_item_id
parameters.description: The line item to add targeting to.

parameters.name: targeting_type
parameters.description: Type of targeting. Options: LOCATION, AGE, GENDER, LANGUAGE, INTEREST, KEYWORD, FOLLOWER_LOOK_ALIKES, PLATFORM, DEVICE, WIFI_ONLY, CUSTOM_AUDIENCE.

parameters.name: targeting_value
parameters.description: The targeting value. Meaning depends on targeting_type (e.g., country code for LOCATION, interest ID for INTEREST).
